### Sort strategy

- **Instrument:** [sorter name]
- **Nozzle:** [size um]
- **Sort mode:** [e.g. 2-way, 4-way]
- **Collection vessel:** [tube type and buffer]
- **Collection conditions:** [cooled / RT / FCS-coated]

**Gate hierarchy:**

1. FSC/SSC — lymphocytes
2. Singlets
3. Live cells
4. [Population gate]
5. [Target sort gate]

**Sorted population:** [full phenotype description]

---
